category_sources: source_facts.description says command-line interface for Open Build Service; official OBS user guide has a section for osc, the command-line tool: https://openbuildservice.org/help/manuals/obs-user-guide/cha-obs-osc
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is osc; official OBS user guide section is named osc, the Command Line Tool: https://openbuildservice.org/help/manuals/obs-user-guide/cha-obs-osc
docs_sources: Official Open Build Service user guide documents osc; openSUSE wiki page covers the osc command-line tool and API: https://openbuildservice.org/help/manuals/obs-user-guide/cha-obs-osc
repo_sources: Official openSUSE OSC wiki points issue filing to github.com/openSUSE/osc, and OBS/openSUSE sources identify osc as the separate command-line client repository: https://en.opensuse.org/openSUSE:OSC
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official OBS user guide identify osc as the CLI for Open Build Service packaging/build workflows.
